payment_requests_provider_payment_ref_un.name: payment_requests_provider_payment_ref_unique
payment_requests_provider_payment_ref_un.where: "payment_requests"."provider" is not null and "payment_requests"."provider_payment_ref" is not null

payment_requests_reversal_event_id_uniqu.name: payment_requests_reversal_event_id_unique
payment_requests_reversal_event_id_uniqu.where: "payment_requests"."provider" is not null and "payment_requests"."reversal_event_id" is not null

posts_schedule_draft_only_check.name: posts_schedule_draft_only_check
posts_schedule_draft_only_check.value: "posts"."status" = 'draft' or ("posts"."scheduled_at" is null and "posts"."schedule_token" is null)
